title: 3mm Tile Leveling Spacers 400PCS，Heighten Tile Levelling Clips for Tiles with a Thickness of 15-23mm
features: Heighten Model-This tile clips have a hole of 28mm/1.1in high and 23mm/0.91in wide, suitable for tiles with a thickness of 15-23mm.

New Material Tile Spacers 3mm- The 3mm tile leveling spacers are made of new material (non-secondary recycled material), environmentally friendly, non-toxic, high toughness, breakpoint design, to achieve uniform breakage from the root.

Breakpoint Design- The root of the 3mm tile leveling clips adopt a breakpoint design to achieve uniform disconnection from the root, which can greatly reduce the workload used in cleaning up the residues inside the tiles.
Does not Affect the Grout Line- The tile leveling clips are one-time use, the part of the clip broken after the tile is fixed is only 1-2mm, which does not affect the grout line.
Wide Range of Applications- This set porcelain spacers for 20mm tiles widely used in indoor, outdoor courtyard, large plaza, such as marble and rock slabs thicker tile paving.
description: Product Description Satisby Heightened Tile Leveling Clips 400PCS Suitable for 15-23mm Thick Tiles 3mm tile leveling clips New materials, high toughness, smooth surface. Please use it with wedges ( width:21mm,height:16mm) and pliers Can't be reused, please calculate the quantity you need Uniformity of the joints Accurate seating, uniformity joints. Levelling at the same time as leaving the joints. Kick along the grout line After fixing (recommended about 24 hours), use a rubber hammer to break the spacer along the direction of the grout line. Or just use work shoes to kick along the direction of the grout line. Does not affect the grout line Toughness of the spacer clip is good, when tiles are fixed, can be easily knocked off with rubber hammer, reduce the extra clean-up workload. After removal the residue of the clip is only 1-2mm,does not affect the grout line. Package Includes: 400PCS Leveling Spacer Clips Instruction Manual Usage Choose ceramic tile or cement paving, the spacer clip is placed on the bottom of the tile, according to the size of the tile surface to place the appropriate number of clips; (generally a 800cm length tile with 4clips, large size tiles increase the amount of corresponding). If you want a width of 3mm grout line or more, you can use this Tile Leveling System withcross-tile spacers of 3mm or more. As it is fully automated mechanical production, rarely the bottom of the leveling clips may have a little burr, does not affect the use, beg for your understanding. The products are bagged by machine counting, there will be errors in the number of individual bags,with an error range within ± 6% of the leveling clips. Separately placed spacers to compensate for counting(by machine)errors or logistical damage. We sincerely ask for your understanding and thank you for your support!
